ksa_text: Knowledge of model monitoring requirements, including data drift detection, prediction drift, performance degradation metrics, input data distribution monitoring, latency and throughput tracking, alerting thresholds, and retraining triggers appropriate for different model types and serving patterns.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data monitor", "throughput", "latency"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3900); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 2 match(es) in DE job postings or certification scope. Skill appears in DE role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
